title: Dance: Fluid Motion
summary: Contemporary dancer twirling in flowing fabric against deep colored backlight.
prompt: A contemporary dancer mid-spin, their flowing silk dress trailing behind them in graceful arcs. Backlight from deep teal and magenta gels rims the silhouette and catches the fabric. The camera circles slowly around them at half their height. Smoke drifts through the beams. Music-video cinematography, 4K hero-shot polish.
